---
title: "Results"
---

## Key findings
Our results indicated that there was no significant variation in Shannon diversity as well as the microbial composition between the two dietary groups. However, the box plot and bar chart demonstrated differences in TMA-producing taxa, with omnivores showing higher abundance, suggesting that diet may influence certain microbial functions

## Figures

![Figure 1](figures/PCoA_Plot_BNFO.png)

![Figure 2](figures/Bar_Plot_BNFO.png)

![Figure 3](figures/Shannon Diversity Plot.png)

![Figure 4](figures/Shannon Diversity Wilcoxon Test.png)

![Figure 5](figures/tma_boxplot_log.jpeg)

![Figure 6](figures/tma_presence_bar.jpeg)
